allow: PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr"; .\\mvnw.cmd -q -B test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "BUILD SUCCESS|BUILD FAILURE|Tests run")

PowerShell($env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr"; .\\mvnw.cmd -B test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "BUILD SUCCESS|BUILD FAILURE|Tests run:"; Write-Output "ExitCode=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) - $\($p.ProcessName\)" } } else { "Nenhum processo na porta 8080" })

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 12620 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "App PID 12620 iniciado em: $\($p.StartTime\)" } else { "PID 12620 nao existe mais" }; "Controller editado em:    " + \(Get-Item 'src\\main\\java\\com\\cs2event\\project\\payment\\PaymentQrController.java'\).LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($c = Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "cloudflared: " + $c.Source } else { "cloudflared NAO instalado" }; $w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget disponivel" } else { "winget indisponivel" })

PowerShell($exe = Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -Recurse -Filter cloudflared.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \(-not $exe\) { $exe = \(Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; "exe=$exe"; $log = "$env:TEMP\\cf.log"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Remove-Item $log }; Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList 'tunnel','--url','http://localhost:8080' -RedirectStandardError $log -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\cf.out" -WindowStyle Hidden; "iniciado, aguardando URL..."; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; \(Get-Content $log -Raw\) -split "`n" | Select-String "trycloudflare.com" | Select-Object -First 3)
